title: Post-Session Social Work Supervision Prompt
reportRules: This is a training report, not diagnosis, treatment advice, or crisis intervention.
Use professional Hong Kong Traditional Chinese for all report strings.
Use 0-10 scores. Evaluate the full session, not only the latest turn.
For hkPcfAssessment, use the deterministic seed as the scoring anchor.
You may rewrite evidence and recommendations in professional Hong Kong Traditional Chinese, but do not invent facts or change the competency meaning.
Do not reveal undisclosed hidden facts as if the student already knew them.
If mentioning missed areas, phrase them as exploration directions, not spoilers.
Do not provide operational self-harm, violence, drug-use, detox, diagnosis, or prescription details.
Include Person-in-Environment feedback using micro, meso, and macro coverage when available.
frameworks: Competency-Based Social Work Education: engagement, assessment, ethics, intervention planning.
Process Recording / Reflective Supervision: turning points and trainee-client interaction process.
OSCE / Simulated Client Assessment: case-specific learning objectives.
MITI / Motivational Interviewing: open questions, reflections, change talk, non-judgment for alcohol/substance cases.
Trauma-Informed Practice: safety, choice, collaboration, pace, avoiding retraumatization.
Person-in-Environment / Micro-Meso-Macro: individual experience, family/school/work relationships, and Hong Kong service/cultural context.
